name: Theme Factory
description_en: Applies one of 10 pre-set or a custom color/font theme to any artifact — slides, docs, HTML pages, or reports.
description_zh: 将 10 种预设主题或自定义配色/字体方案应用于幻灯片、文档、HTML 页面或报告等任意产物。
long_en: Provides 10 named themes (Ocean Depths, Sunset Boulevard, Forest Canopy, Modern Minimalist, Golden Hour, Arctic Frost, Desert Rose, Tech Innovation, Botanical Garden, Midnight Galaxy), each defined in a bundled themes/ directory with hex color palettes and font pairings. Workflow: display the bundled theme-showcase.pdf, wait for user selection, read the theme file, then apply colors and fonts to the target artifact. Can also generate a custom theme from a text description. Works with PPTX slides, documents, and HTML pages.
long_zh: 提供 10 个命名主题（海洋深处、日落大道、森林树冠、现代简约、黄金时刻、北极冰霜、沙漠玫瑰、科技创新、植物花园、午夜星系），每个主题在内置 themes/ 目录中定义，包含十六进制色板与字体搭配。工作流程：展示内置 theme-showcase.pdf → 等待用户选择 → 读取主题文件 → 将配色和字体应用于目标产物。也支持根据文字描述生成自定义主题，兼容 PPTX 幻灯片、文档与 HTML 页面。
sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. No network access or external API calls required. Reads local bundled theme files and applies styling to artifacts. Font availability depends on the user's environment.
sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。无需网络访问或外部 API 调用，读取本地内置主题文件并将样式应用于产物。字体可用性取决于用户环境。
